actions.name: Clean Workflow Logs
actions.description: Cleans up old workflow logs by deleting runs older than a specified number of days while retaining a defined number of recent runs. It allows customization of the age of runs to delete and the count of runs to keep through inputs.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on Mon

actions.name: Sync Labels from YAML
actions.description: Syncs labels from a YAML file to issues and pull requests based on modifications. Utilizes a labeler action to apply labels defined in '.github/labels.yml' to the relevant GitHub entities. Supports both dry-run and actual label application depending on the event type.

actions.name: push
actions.description: Sends a notification to Discord upon merging changes into the master branch, including details about the repository, the user who merged, and the commit message. Utilizes a webhook to format and deliver the message with relevant information.

actions.name: Create docs preview on PR
actions.description: Creates a documentation preview on pull requests by building the documentation using MkDocs and publishing it to the `www` branch. It also comments on the pull request with a link to the generated preview. The process includes checking out the relevant branches, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and handling caching for efficiency.

actions.name: pr-announce.yml
actions.description: Announces pull requests on Discord when opened against the master branch, providing details about the PR and the author. Utilizes a webhook to send a formatted message containing the repository and PR information.

actions.name: Automatic Pull Request Labeling
actions.description: Automatically labels pull requests based on their size and file categories. Removes the 'Ready to merge' label when a pull request is opened, reopened, or synchronized. Applies category labels and size labels according to modified files in the pull request.

actions.name: Pull from Armbian config
actions.description: Pulls configuration data from the Armbian config repository and updates the documentation accordingly. Generates documentation by assembling configuration and syncing relevant files to the documentation directory. Creates a pull request to update the documentation repository with the new changes.

actions.name: Pull mirrors from database
actions.description: Pulls and updates mirror information from a database into documentation files. Updates the rsync section with current synchronization commands and sizes, and refreshes the Current Mirrors section with active mirror details. Generates a pull request for the documentation changes.

actions.name: Update documentation website
actions.description: Generates HTML documentation and deploys it to a server. Installs Python dependencies, builds the documentation using MkDocs, and transfers the output via rsync to a specified server location. The process includes setting up SSH for secure file transfer.
